author: CWALabs
name: CosmosDB Passkey Login Page
description: Adds a passkey-enabled Login Razor Page (scaffolded Identity style) that works with AspNetCore.Identity.CosmosDb passkey endpoints. Drops into Areas/Identity/Pages/Account/. Requires AddCosmosPasskeyUiIntegration / MapCosmosPasskeyUiEndpoints to be registered in Program.cs.

RootNamespace.description: The root namespace of the target project (e.g. MyApp). Applied to the Areas.Identity.Pages.Account namespace.

UserType.description: The Identity user type used by SignInManager (e.g. IdentityUser, ApplicationUser).
